name: IPhone 13 128GB/256GB
description: iPhone 13. The most advanced dual camera system ever on an iPhone. The lightning-fast A15 Bionic chip. Huge leap in battery power. Sturdy design. And a brighter Super Retina XDR display

features.Key Features: 6.1 inch Super Retina XDR display | Cinematic Mode adds shallow depth of field and automatically shifts focus in your videos | Advanced dual camera system with 12 MP Wide and Ultra Wide cameras; Photography Style, Smart HDR 4, Night mode, HDR 4K Dolby | Vision recording | 12 MP TrueDepth front camera with Night mode, 4K Dolby Vision HDR recording | A15 Bionic chip for lightning-fast performance | Up to 19 hours of video playback | Sturdy design with Ceramic Shield | Industry-leading IP68 water resistance level | iOS 15 includes new features to do more with iPhone | Supports MagSafe accessories for easy pairing and faster wireless charging
features.What’s In The Box: iPhone dengan iOS 15. | Kabel USB-C ke Lightning. | Buku Manual dan dokumentasi lain.
